subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ2.18
question_html:
The equilibrium constant, Kc, for the reaction 2A + 4B ⇌ 2C + 4D has a value of 4.0. What is the value of Kc for the reaction below at the same temperature?

C + 2D ⇌ A + 2B

A.  0.25

B.  0.50

C.  1.0

D.  16
examiners_html: 60% of the candidates deduced the value of Kc for related equations. The question had a strong discrimination between high-scoring and low-scoring candidates.
